task: T53 — Round/objective HUD stats for CA/FreezeTag/KeyHunt/Survival (alive counts, KH key pack, eliminated grey-out, Survival role/hunter disclosure)
summary: Landed the full T53 stack minus the T54-owned splices (provided verbatim below). Server capture APIs: ClanArena.AliveCount/IsEliminatedPlayer (QC CA_count_alive_players + ca_isEliminated, dead-only approximation documented), FreezeTag.AliveCount (frozen-or-dead = eliminated, per-frame recount documented as value-identical to QC's event recount), KeyHunt.PackKeyState(viewer) (QC kh_update_state incl. the per-recipient 31=self override; deliberate deviation: wire carries team INDEX+1 (2..5) not SVQC codes, matching the dormant ModIconsPanel.DrawKeyhunt decode — verified against the exact ((s>>(5i))&31)-1 expression), Survival.RoleAssigned/IsHunter/IsEliminatedPlayer/DisclosesHuntersTo (QC SurvivalStatuses_SendEntity hunter visibility: hunters always, everyone at round end). New codec src/XonoticGodot.Net/GametypeStatusBlock.cs (Capture per-viewer / Deserialize→Decoded / fold-to-nonzero FNV Hash) implements the brief's normative wire layout exactly; id lists are roster-ordered for deterministic bytes → stable per-peer hash gating. HUD: ModIconsPanel gained ClanArena/FreezeTag/Survival modes — HUD_Mod_CA_Draw grid (verbatim HUD_GetRowCount formula, row-first column fill, aspect-fit cells, layout cvars hud_panel_modicons_ca_layout/_freezetag_layout default 1, QC count colors) and the HUD_Mod_Survival Hunter(red)/Survivor(green) tag (status 0 = draw nothing; the server sends 0 pre-round, replacing QC's GAMESTARTTIME gate). ScoreboardPanel: ScoreRow.Eliminated + SetWireRows(eliminatedNetIds) optional param + DrawRow black fill at cvar hud_panel_scoreboard_table_highlight_alpha_eliminated (0.6 default). All 4-of-5 Base citations spot-checked in QC before coding (kh_update_state, CA/FT counters, elimination.qc, SurvivalStatuses, cl_* renderers, HUD_GetRowCount). Both ServerNet/ClientNet already carry "[A3 reserved: T53 mode-stats block]" markers — snippets anchor to them.

testsAdded: GametypeStatusTests.Kh_PackKeyState_MatchesPanelDecode_AndPersonalizes (cross-checked against the exact ModIconsPanel.DrawKeyhunt decode expression; raw slots [3,31,30,0] → decoded [2,30,29,-1]; per-viewer 31 personalization)
GametypeStatusTests.Surv_HunterIdsNeverLeakToPreyMidRound_DisclosedAtRoundEnd (the anti-cheat invariant + round-end scoreboard out + pre-round myStatus=0)
buildStatus: dotnet build XonoticGodot.csproj: Build succeeded (after one transient failure from another agent's half-finished Commands.cs/BotPopulation.cs edits — resolved on retry per protocol). Targeted tests: GametypeStatusTests 7/7 pass; neighbor slice (GametypeStatus+KeyHuntVisual+SurvivalScoring+SpectatorRules+Scores+ScoreboardColumns) 49/49 pass. Full suite: 1276/1318 pass, 42 failures ALL in concurrently-edited movement/physics/vehicle classes (MovementParityTests/SpectatorPhysicsTests/CrouchTests/JumppadTests/DeterminismTests/NudgeOutOfSolidTests/VehicleRuntimeTests/etc. — stack traces throw inside PlayerPhysics.Move; git status confirms src/XonoticGodot.Common/Physics/PlayerPhysics.cs + MovementParameters.cs are mid-edit by another wave agent; none of these classes touch any T53 file).
findings: GameWorld.ActivateGameType (src/XonoticGodot.Server/GameWorld.cs:1141) wires Survival with EnableRounds() using the DEFAULT CA-style team predicates (needs >=2 teams with survivors) even though Survival is FFA — the world-level Rounds handler may never start/end sensibly in surv; the mode's own surv.Handler (driven by surv.Tick at GameWorld.cs:1405) is the real round driver. This is why GametypeStatusBlock deliberately gates Survival roles on surv.Handler, not the spliced roundStarted param. Not fixed (GameWorld is read-only for T53).
Full-suite failures (42) from another agent's in-flight PlayerPhysics.cs/MovementParameters.cs edits — reported above, not mine to fix.

Pre-existing, unchanged per charter: ModIconsPanel.DrawKeyhunt uses a simple horizontal strip layout rather than QC's 2x2 quadrant arrangement for 4 keys on a near-square panel (cl_keyhunt.qc:49-57); its decode/blink math is faithful and is the contract the new wire pack was verified against.
residuals: Feature is dark until T54 applies the snippets + the v7 protocol bump (by design; both ServerNet.cs:924 and ClientNet.cs:625 already carry '[A3 reserved: T53 mode-stats block]' markers my snippets anchor to). Manual smoke (brief testPlan item 8) is therefore deferred to post-T54.

CA/Survival eliminated approximation: QC ca_isEliminated/surv_isEliminated (Base qcsrc/common/gametypes/gametype/clanarena/sv_clanarena.qc:243-250, survival/sv_survival.qc:228-235) include INGAME_JOINING and frags==FRAGS_PLAYER_OUT_OF_GAME; the port lacks those states so eliminated = dead (CA) / tracked-and-not-alive (Surv) — late joiners waiting for the next round won't grey. Documented at the IsEliminatedPlayer comments.

Survival panel hide timing: QC shows the Hunter/Survivor tag until the NEXT round's countdown begins (cl_survival.qc:60 gates on ROUNDSTARTTIME>time); the port sends myStatus=0 as soon as surv.Handler leaves InProgress, so the tag hides at round end instead — a few seconds earlier. Acceptable v1 stand-in, noted in Survival.RoleAssigned docs.

Survival scoreboard row COLORING (QC SURV_COLOR_PREY=51 green / SURV_COLOR_HUNTER=68 red colormap, cl_survival.qc:31-44) and DrawScoreboard_Force (scoreboard forced open at round end, cl_survival.qc:105-109) are NOT ported; the hunter ids needed for the row tint ARE already on the wire (Decoded.HunterNetIds) for a follow-up.

ScoreboardPanel.SetWireRows eliminated-flag 'pure data test' from the brief's testPlan is impossible as specified: tests cannot reference game/ (project convention). The codec round-trip tests cover the EliminatedNetIds data; the row flag + DrawRow fill are 3 lines of straight-through plumbing verified by compilation only.

GametypeStatusBlock.Capture's roundStarted parameter is reserved/unused (signature kept to match the splice contract): each mode's own state (kh.Phase / surv.Handler) is the authoritative gate, and GameWorld's Rounds handler is mispredicated for Survival anyway (see findings).

Layout-1 team icon is a colored swatch, not the 'player_red|blue|yellow|pink' skin texture (consistent with this panel's existing CTF/KH swatch stand-ins — there is no TextureCache in ModIconsPanel); QC layout/colors/grid math are otherwise faithful incl. the verbatim HUD_GetRowCount formula (Base qcsrc/client/hud/hud.qc:165-170).
GameDemo/offline path gets none of this (no ClientNet) — out of scope per brief.
